title: GPNAS: A Neural Network Architecture Search Framework Based on Graphical Predictor
authors: Not specified in the provided text
abstract: This paper presents GPNAS, a neural network architecture search framework that uses a graphical predictor. The authors propose a method that decouples the search space of skip-connection and operator, uses BOHB as the searcher, and employs a GCN-based predictor.
contributions: Built an alternate neural network search framework to decouple the search space of skip-connection and operator
Abandoned the search framework of RL and adopted BOHB as the searcher to improve efficiency
Designed a GCN-based (Graph Convolutional Network) predictor

methodology.search_space: Decoupled search space for skip-connection and operator

related_work.limitation: Fail to solve credit allocation problem
Fail to solve credit allocation problem

related_work.method: Alternate search model based on RL
